comment.body:
My understanding and plz correct me if wrong.
"So positive speed=positive Vanna= vol down/delta down" basically correct but Vanna is very complicated and not always same as speed.
Then it does not necessarily mean the MMs have to buy or sell spot to hedge. Price could be driven by many reasons. MMs' hedge is more expected near the zero Vanna point where Vanna flip + Vol effect could force MMs to take actions.
